chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.S— 1009 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 14.11.2023. Petitioner present in person. This petition, pending since 2016, challenges successive orders rendered in the family jurisdiction and the same has been disapproved by the Hon’ble Supreme Court in the cases of M.Hamad Hassan Vs. Mst. Isma Bukhari and others (2023 SCMR 1434) and Arif Fareed Vs. Bibi Sara and others (2023 SCMR 413). Be that as it may, despite caution having been recorded on 08.09.2023, diary demonstrates that on each successive date petitioner appears in person and seeks a continuance. Even today petitioner appears in person; once again seeks time; and expresses his inability to proceed. Dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application. Judge A.Rasheed/stenographer
